reviews.review_description:
Love the concept. It’s not just a game — it’s you stepping into a story. A new form of storytelling where the player becomes part of the narrative. I really liked the texturing style.

The POC is a strong start. I’m excited to see how it develops — keep going!
This game is terrible because even when I tried to grab the girls hand, it was completely out of my boundary. I am very disappointed. This game is just flat out Horrible.
